data.title: GalaxyOne Focuses on Staking Products for Retail Investors
data.description: GalaxyOne is shifting its focus towards staking products rather than prediction markets for retail investors with investible assets ranging from $100,000 to $1 million. According to NS3.AI, Zac Prince highlighted that the platform started supporting Solana staking last month. Additionally, there are plans to introduce Ethereum staking and lending options in the future.

data.title: Iran's Crypto Transactions: $3 Billion Shift Since 2022, BTC Accepted for Oil Ship Tolls
data.description: Iran has reportedly begun accepting Bitcoin (BTC) as a payment method for oil ship tolls through the Strait of Hormuz, according to Sam Lyman of the Bitcoin Policy Institute. Since 2022, Iran has shifted approximately $3 billion in cryptocurrency transactions. According to NS3.AI, most of these transactions are still denominated in USDt. However, Lyman noted that there is currently no on-chain evidence of any BTC toll payments.

data.title: USDT Transfer: $285 Million Moved from Aave to Spark
data.description: A significant transfer of 285,111,406 USDT, valued at approximately $285 million, has been executed from Aave to Spark. According to NS3.AI, this transaction highlights the ongoing shifts within the cryptocurrency market, reflecting strategic movements by investors and platforms. The transfer underscores the dynamic nature of digital asset management and the evolving landscape of decentralized finance.

data.title: Credit Investors Shift to Riskier Debt Amid Iran-U.S. Truce Hopes
data.description: Credit investors are increasingly turning to riskier debt, anticipating that the truce between Iran and the United States will continue. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this shift as investors move away from safer assets they have preferred since the conflict began in late February. This trend reflects growing confidence in the stability of the geopolitical situation, encouraging investors to seek higher returns in more volatile markets.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 630 USDT with a 1.63% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 18, 2026, 18:43 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 630 USDT and is now trading at 629.72998 USDT, with a narrowed 1.63% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: AI TRENDS | AI Hardware Market Projections Boost AI Crypto Tokens
data.description: Jensen Huang's recent remarks on the potential of a $1 trillion AI hardware market by 2027 have reignited interest in AI-related cryptocurrencies. According to NS3.AI, this development has positively impacted tokens like Bittensor's TAO and Fetch.ai's FET. In response, Grayscale has increased its allocation of TAO to approximately 43% within its decentralized AI fund this week.

data.title: Parasite Pool Mines Second Bitcoin Block After 48 Days
data.description:
Parasite Pool has successfully mined its second Bitcoin block, number 945,601, on Friday. According to CoinDesk, this achievement comes approximately 48 days after the pool's initial block discovery. Parasite Pool operates by rewarding the block finder with 1 BTC, while the remaining rewards are distributed among all participants. This unique reward structure aims to incentivize miners by offering a guaranteed payout to the block finder, while also ensuring that all contributors receive a share of the earnings. The pool's approach has garnered attention within the cryptocurrency community for its innovative distribution model.

The mining of block 945,601 marks a significant milestone for Parasite Pool, highlighting its growing presence in the Bitcoin mining landscape. The pool's ability to mine a second block within a relatively short period demonstrates its potential to compete with more established mining operations. As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, mining pools like Parasite Pool play a crucial role in maintaining the decentralized nature of Bitcoin by enabling smaller miners to participate and earn rewards. This development underscores the dynamic and competitive nature of the Bitcoin mining industry, where new players are constantly emerging and challenging the status quo.

data.title: Hyperliquid Founder Reflects on Prediction Market Project Challenges
data.description: Hyperliquid founder Jeff Yan discussed the challenges faced by his prediction market project launched in 2018. According to NS3.AI, Yan identified product-market fit as a significant hurdle, compounded by the transition from a bull to a bear market, which diminished users' interest in exploring on-chain products.

data.title: Kevin Warsh's Crypto Holdings and Potential Impact on Federal Reserve Policies
data.description: Kevin Warsh, a candidate for the Federal Reserve chair, has revealed his crypto-related investments, including holdings in Polymarket. According to NS3.AI, Warsh has committed to divesting these assets if confirmed for the position. Reuters highlighted Warsh's preference for a reduced Federal Reserve balance sheet and a more stringent monetary policy, which could have implications for Bitcoin and the accessibility of crypto banks.

data.title: Bitcoin Miner NYDIG in Talks to Acquire Alcoa's Dormant Smelter Site
data.description: Alcoa is reportedly in advanced negotiations to sell its inactive Massena East smelter site in New York to Bitcoin miner NYDIG. According to NS3.AI, Alcoa's CEO Bill Oplinger indicated that the deal is expected to be finalized by the middle of this year. The site, which has been inactive since 2014, benefits from hydropower supplied by the New York Power Authority. This acquisition would further NYDIG's expansion in the Bitcoin mining sector, following its strategic investment in Coinmint in October 2024 and its agreement in March 2025 to purchase Crusoe Energy's Bitcoin mining operations.

data.title: Shell Proposes Solutions to Quantum Network Challenges
data.description:
Shell has put forward a new perspective on the ongoing debate surrounding quantum networks. According to CoinDesk, the company suggests that the issues faced by these networks are not insurmountable and can be addressed with innovative solutions. Shell's approach involves reframing the current discourse to focus on the potential for fixing the network rather than dwelling on its limitations.

Shell's proposal emphasizes the importance of collaboration and technological advancement in overcoming the hurdles associated with quantum networks. By shifting the narrative towards constructive solutions, Shell aims to foster a more optimistic outlook on the future of quantum technology. This perspective encourages stakeholders to invest in research and development that could lead to breakthroughs in network stability and security. The company believes that by addressing these challenges head-on, the quantum network can evolve into a robust and reliable system, paving the way for new applications and opportunities in various sectors.

data.title: Shibarium Data Reveals Significant SHIB Movements in April
data.description: Shibarium data from April 9 to April 16 indicates notable activity in the SHIB market. According to NS3.AI, there were approximately 1.24 trillion SHIB in net exchange outflows, while exchange reserves stood at about 80.9 trillion SHIB. Additionally, large wallets accumulated around 2.02 trillion SHIB since the beginning of April, and the total number of holder addresses surpassed 1.562 million.

data.title: Rising Demand for Crypto in Global South Amid Currency Instability
data.description:
Demand for cryptocurrency is rapidly increasing in the Global South, particularly in cross-border transactions where traditional payment methods like cards are ineffective and local currencies are unstable. According to CoinDesk, Adrien Duchâteau, Stripe's crypto go-to-market lead, highlighted this trend as a significant driver of crypto adoption in these regions. The instability of local currencies and the inefficiencies of traditional financial systems are pushing individuals and businesses to explore digital currencies as viable alternatives.

In many countries within the Global South, economic challenges and fluctuating exchange rates have made it difficult for people to rely on their national currencies. This has led to a growing interest in cryptocurrencies, which offer a more stable and accessible means of conducting transactions. The decentralized nature of digital currencies also provides a level of security and independence from government-controlled financial systems, making them an attractive option for those seeking financial autonomy. As the demand for crypto continues to rise, it is expected to play a crucial role in shaping the future of finance in these regions.

data.title: Nvidia's 2026 Target Set at $265 Amid Revenue Growth and Market Concerns
data.description: Wall Street analysts have set a median target price of $265 per share for Nvidia by 2026, which is approximately 50% higher than its current trading price of around $177. According to NS3.AI, analyst projections for Nvidia's stock range from $210 to $360. Despite reporting a significant 73% revenue growth in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026, macroeconomic concerns have kept Nvidia's stock trading sideways.

data.title: RaveDAO Addresses Allegations of RAVE Token Price Manipulation
data.description: RaveDAO has responded to recent allegations and rumors concerning the manipulation of RAVE token prices. According to Odaily, the organization clarified on the X platform that the RaveDAO team is not involved in the high volatility of RAVE token prices and is not responsible for the recent fluctuations. RaveDAO emphasized its commitment to transparency and is currently focused on promoting the widespread adoption of Web3 through offline activities.

data.title: Polymarket Trading Volume Surges During CS2 IEM Rio Playoffs
data.description: According to NS3.AI, Seer Channel monitoring has revealed significant trading activity in a Polymarket market related to the CS2 IEM Rio playoffs. An account identified as Dhdhsjsj reportedly invested over $140,000 on Spirit defeating Team Falcons. Despite this substantial investment, the account's total loss exceeded $700,000. During the match, the market experienced a total trading volume of $897,000.

data.title: RaveDAO responds to recent rumors: The team is not involved in the excessive price fluctuations of the RAVE token.
data.description: In response to recent allegations and rumors of RAVE token price manipulation, RaveDAO issued a statement on the X platform stating: "We have noticed the rumors and allegations surrounding RAVE and the RaveDAO team. We want to make it clear that the RaveDAO team is not involved in the high volatility of the RAVE token price and is not responsible for the recent price fluctuations. RaveDAO values ​​transparency and is currently focused on promoting the large-scale adoption of Web3 through offline events."

data.title: Polymarket Sees Significant Investment in Spirit vs Team Falcons Match
data.description:
In a notable development within the prediction market, a user identified as Dhdhsjsj has invested over $140,000 in favor of Spirit defeating Team Falcons in the Polymarket event 'CS2 IEM Rio Playoffs Spirit vs Team Falcons.' According to Odaily, the shares were purchased at an average price of 41.5¢, totaling 357,106.3 shares. The ongoing match has generated a total trading volume of $897,000.

The CS2 (Counter-Strike 2) IEM event is part of the Intel Extreme Masters series, organized by ESL, and is classified as an S-Tier event (Valve Tier 1), with prize money typically around $1 million. Both Spirit (Green Dragon team) and Team Falcons (Falcon team) are considered mainstream top teams.

data.title: The account, with total losses exceeding $700,000, had over $140,000 in buy orders. (The following appears to be unrelated and possibly a separate sentence fragment: "CS2 IEM Rio Playoffs: Spirit defeats Team Falcons")
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket prediction event "CS2 IEM Rio Playoffs Spirit vs. Team Falcons," account Dhdhsjsj (0x5d58e38cd0a7e6f5fa67b7f9c2f70dd70df09a15) bought over $140,000 worth of shares in favor of Spirit defeating Team Falcons. The average purchase price was 41.5¢, and the total number of shares purchased was 357,106.3. Currently, the total trading volume for the Spirit vs. Team Falcons event is $897,000, and the match is ongoing. The CS2 (Counter-Strike 2) IEM tournament is part of the Intel Extreme Masters series, a top-tier offline tournament hosted by ESL, belonging to the S-Tier (Valve Tier 1) level, with prize money typically around $1 million. Spirit (Green Dragons) and Team Falcons (Falcons) are both mainstream top teams. Odaily Seer continuously focuses on the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: U.S. Military to Expand Naval Operations Beyond Middle East
data.description:
The U.S. military is preparing to board and seize oil tankers linked to Iran in international waters in the coming days, according to a report by the Wall Street Journal. According to BlockBeats, this move marks an expansion of U.S. naval operations beyond the Middle East.

This development comes as Iran's military continues to tighten its control over the Strait of Hormuz. On Saturday, Iranian forces attacked several commercial vessels and declared the waterway under strict Iranian control.

These actions have caught shipping companies off guard, especially after Iran's foreign minister announced just a day earlier that the strait was fully open to commercial shipping, a statement that had been praised by U.S. President Donald Trump.
